# James Tannahill — New York (Map)

> Interactive dark Mapbox map centered on W 57th Street, Manhattan, marking the Plocamium Holdings office. Companion page to the digital business card at contact.jamestannahill.com.

## map.jamestannahill.com

- [Map](https://map.jamestannahill.com/): Cinematic fly-in map, Plocamium Holdings marker, W 57th St, New York (40.765N, 73.977W)

## Related

- [Contact card](https://contact.jamestannahill.com/): Digital business card, vCard, Apple Wallet pass
- [Main site](https://www.jamestannahill.com/): Personal site of James Tannahill
